PORTFOLIO

Ruzzle

If you're looking for a unique kind of vehicle puzzle where you can draw a path for a car and send it to its destination with delight, then this is one of those unique car jigsaw puzzles you might enjoy a lot. Link: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.maliyo.car.make.road.path.puzzle.jigsaw.ruzzle&hl=en&gl=US

Chicken Pickin

Chicken Pickin is a mobile game in which you pick eggs and chicks while avoiding the mother hen and advance through challenging stages. Link: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.maliyo.chickenpickin&hl=en&gl=US

Farmtastic

Start a new farm, grow your produce, generate revenue, and create more farm businesses. Make lots of money and top the leaderboard. Link :https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.maliyo.farmtastic&hl=en&gl=US
